$carId..write: auth != null && ((newData.exists() && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid && root.child('users').child(auth.uid).child('role').val() === 'owner') || (data.exists() && data.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid) || root.child('admins').child(auth.uid).val() === true)) || (!newData.exists() && data.exists() && (data.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid || root.child('admins').child(auth.uid).val() === true)))

bookings..read: auth != null && (root.child('admins').child(auth.uid).val() === true || (query.orderByChild === 'ownerUid' && query.equalTo === auth.uid) || (query.orderByChild === 'renterUid' && query.equalTo === auth.uid))

$id..read: auth != null && (root.child('admins').child(auth.uid).val() === true || data.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid || data.child('renterUid').val() === auth.uid)

$msgId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['senderUid','createdAt']) && newData.child('senderUid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber() && (!newData.hasChild('text') || (newData.child('text').isString() && newData.child('text').val().length <= 2000)) && (!newData.child('fromAdmin').exists() || newData.child('fromAdmin').val() === (root.child('admins').child(auth.uid).val() === true)) && (!newData.child('attachment').exists() || newData.child('attachment/path').val().length <= 1400000)

payments..read: auth != null && (root.child('admins').child(auth.uid).val() === true || (query.orderByChild === 'ownerUid' && query.equalTo === auth.uid) || (query.orderByChild === 'renterUid' && query.equalTo === auth.uid))

$bookingId..read: auth != null && (root.child('admins').child(auth.uid).val() === true || data.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid || data.child('renterUid').val() === auth.uid)

$carId..write: auth != null && ((newData.exists() && newData.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid) || (!newData.exists() && (!data.exists() || data.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid)) || root.child('admins').child(auth.uid).val() === true)
